**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Beichen Electric Equipment Co. is an active, medium-to-light industrial manufacturer and engineering contractor operating in the electrical power sector. With a robust paid-in capital of nearly 51 million RMB and a verified workforce of 28 insured employees in 2023, the company possesses genuine physical assembly and engineering capabilities. Its core operations encompass the manufacturing and assembly of high/low voltage switchgear cabinets, power transmission equipment, and IoT environmental monitoring instruments. Furthermore, a strategic pivot is evident in its expanded 'General Projects' scope, highlighting a strong move towards renewable energy infrastructure, specifically the manufacturing of photovoltaic components, solar power integration, and the deployment/sales of EV charging stations. This positions Beichen Electric as a transitioning entity from traditional power distribution to modern green energy and smart grid systems.
